summary: Phase 19 Animated Launch Screen testing completed successfully. All core features verified: intro screen appears on cold launch with black background and 'LAWFLOW' typographic animation, skip button (testID='intro-skip-btn') appears and functions correctly, auto-navigation works after animation completes (~2.5s), full login flow operational after intro (Phone 9876543210 → OTP 123456 → Dashboard). Pure React Native Animated API implementation working as expected with no video-related errors or runtime crashes.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ intro.tsx (Phase 19) correctly implemented with pure React Native Animated API
✓ Black background (#000000) with white text for brand reveal
✓ Letter-by-letter animation sequence working: slide up + fade → glitch → settle → tagline
✓ Skip button positioned correctly (top-right) with testID='intro-skip-btn' and proper hitSlop
✓ Module-level flag 'introShown' in index.tsx prevents re-showing intro on warm navigations
✓ Safety timeout (3.5s) ensures navigation even if animation doesn't complete
✓ Fade-to-white transition overlay properly implemented before navigation
✓ No video dependencies or expo-video imports found (complete rollback successful)
✓ _layout.tsx correctly configured with Stack.Screen for /intro with fade animation
✓ Navigation flow correct: index → intro (if !introShown) → index (introShown=true) → login/dashboard
seed_data_creation: No new test data created. Used existing test account (Adv. Priya Sharma, phone 9876543210, OTP 123456).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 19 Animated Launch Screen fully tested and working. Intro screen shows on cold launch with pure RN Animated API (no video). Module-level flag 'introShown' in index.tsx controls display. Test account 9876543210/123456 logs in successfully. expo-av deprecation warning in logs is unrelated to Phase 19 (it's for existing audio features like voice notes). All Phase 19 requirements met with no issues.
features_verified: ✓ Cold launch shows intro screen with black background (#000)
✓ Tagline 'Legal Practice, Simplified' appears during animation
✓ Skip button appears after ~500ms in top-right corner
✓ Skip button has correct testID='intro-skip-btn' and is tappable
✓ Tapping Skip navigates to login screen (via index → login flow)
✓ Auto-navigation works: animation completes → navigates to login/dashboard
✓ Login screen loads correctly after intro (phone input visible)
✓ Full login flow works: Phone 9876543210 → OTP 123456 → Dashboard
✓ Dashboard loads showing 'Good Evening, Adv. Priya...' with stats and tabs
✓ Intro re-appears on page reload (module flag resets on cold launch)
✓ No video-related errors in console (video artifacts fully removed)
✓ No React Native red screen errors
✓ No runtime crashes during animation or navigation

video_related.note: expo-av deprecation warning is NOT related to Phase 19. This is for existing audio features (voice notes) in the app, not the removed video intro. No expo-video errors or video file loading issues detected.

other_warnings: props.pointerEvents deprecated (React Native web compatibility warning)
useNativeDriver not supported on web (falls back to JS-based animation - expected)
shadow* style props deprecated (React Native web compatibility)
expo-notifications not fully supported on web (existing limitation)

phase_19_requirements_checklist.no_video_errors: ✓ PASS - No expo-video or video file errors
phase_19_requirements_checklist.no_crashes: ✓ PASS - No runtime errors or red screens
phase_19_requirements_checklist.pure_rn_animated: ✓ PASS - Using React Native Animated API only
